key_observations: Resident reviews confirm recurring friction around maintenance work orders, billing errors, and unclear check-in processes. Lead with how EliseAI automates maintenance intake and status updates as well as move-in communication workflows, since these are the exact pain points showing up publicly for this company.

Amanda's role in team member relations and policy means she is likely attuned to the burden repetitive communication places on frontline staff. Frame EliseAI as a way to reduce that burden and improve the day-to-day experience for leasing and operations employees, not just a resident-facing tool.

Provo is seeing strong income growth at 8.2% year over year, which typically lifts resident expectations around service quality and responsiveness. Use this as market context to explain why automated, always-on communication is becoming a baseline expectation rather than a differentiator.
